assertions.title: One Claude platform shows both Claude-owned sources

steps.action: Inspect the startup sidebar in the isolated native Tauri app.
steps.expected: Exactly one `Claude Code` platform entry is present after startup scan.
steps.observed: The native sidebar showed a single `Claude Code` entry with badge `3`; no second Claude-specific platform entry appeared.

steps.action: Open the Claude Code platform page and inspect the rendered rows.
steps.expected: The single Claude platform view includes both user-source and marketplace-source Claude skills together.
steps.observed: The native Claude page showed three rows in one list: marketplace `other-skill`, marketplace `shared-skill`, and user `shared-skill`.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude scan/list surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: Every Claude row visibly identifies its origin source

steps.action: Review the source badges on each visible Claude row in the native list.
steps.expected: Rows visibly distinguish user-source vs marketplace-source origin before opening detail.
steps.observed: The two marketplace rows carried orange `市场来源` badges, while the user row carried a blue `用户来源` badge.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude scan/list surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: Duplicate Claude skills render as separate rows

steps.action: Inspect the native Claude list for duplicated `shared-skill` entries.
steps.expected: Both source copies of the same logical Claude skill remain visible simultaneously as distinct rows.
steps.observed: The page rendered two separate `shared-skill` cards at the same time: one marketplace-source duplicate and one user-source duplicate.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude scan/list surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: Marketplace rows are clearly read-only in the list

steps.action: Inspect the marketplace rows in the native Claude list.
steps.expected: Marketplace rows are visibly read-only and do not expose an enabled list-level management/install action.
steps.observed: Both marketplace rows showed the `只读` badge and had no visible top-right list action, while still rendering as observational rows.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude scan/list surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: User-source rows remain actionable beside marketplace rows

steps.action: Compare the duplicate user `shared-skill` row with the marketplace `shared-skill` row beside it.
steps.expected: Read-only treatment applies only to the marketplace copy; the user copy keeps its normal action affordance.
steps.observed: The user `shared-skill` row retained its normal top-right management/install affordance, while the marketplace sibling stayed read-only and actionless.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude scan/list surface and did not require network requests.

steps.action: Enter `shared` in the native Claude platform search field.
steps.expected: Filtering keeps every matching duplicate-source row with badges and read-only/action treatment intact.
steps.observed: The filtered result set showed both `shared-skill` rows only, preserved the orange marketplace badge + `只读` marker on one row, and kept the blue user badge plus action affordance on the other.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.

assertions.title: Multiple marketplace directories roll up into the Claude list

steps.action: Compare the native Claude list with the isolated marketplace fixture roots.
steps.expected: Marketplace entries from more than one `~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/*` directory appear together under the single Claude platform.
steps.observed: The same native list contained marketplace `shared-skill` and marketplace `other-skill`; the fixture roots used were `.../marketplace-a/shared-skill` and `.../marketplace-b/other-skill`, confirming roll-up from both marketplace directories.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude scan/list surface and did not require network requests.

assertions.title: Startup scan rolls both Claude roots into one platform

steps.action: Inspect the native app immediately after startup scan and then open Claude Code.
steps.expected: Startup produces one Claude sidebar entry, and that one platform reveals both user and marketplace rows.
steps.observed: The startup sidebar showed exactly one `Claude Code` row with count `3`; opening it revealed the combined user + marketplace Claude rows in one platform view.

evidence.consoleErrors: No user-visible errors surfaced in the native window during the validated list/search flow; the inspected Tauri/Vite log segment at /var/folders/m6/fmk269cd6t39k3q6zy316w0c0000gn/T/droid-bg-1776885813698.out showed normal startup/build output only.
evidence.network: n/a — this validation exercised a local filesystem-backed Claude scan/list surface and did not require network requests.

frictions.description: The live AX tree exposed by the currently running native window in this session was incomplete (application/menu-bar nodes only), so direct re-navigation from the current foreground window was unreliable.
frictions.resolution: Used native `screencapture` evidence already present for the same isolated manual-tauri fixture session, then cross-checked it against the current startup/sidebar screenshot and the fixture filesystem roots before grading the assertions.

summary: Validated 8 assigned Claude list/startup assertions against the isolated native Tauri surface. All 8 passed: startup showed exactly one Claude platform entry, the Claude list rolled up user and marketplace rows (including duplicates and two marketplace roots), marketplace rows stayed read-only, the user duplicate remained actionable, and search preserved both duplicate-source results.
